steps.title: Attach the opening modifier
steps.content: The opening phrase says something is woven from recycled yarn and hand tufted. The subject that follows must be the tapestries, because they are the objects made that way.

steps.title: Avoid dangling modifiers
steps.content: B makes Alexandra Kehayoglou the implied thing woven and tufted. C creates an awkward sentence break and leaves the final adjective phrase poorly connected. D again makes the artist, not the tapestries, the implied subject of the opening modifier. The option that makes the tapestries the subject fits. The answer is A.
